```{python}
import pandas
import numpy

from tensorflow import keras
from tensorflow.keras import Sequential
from tensorflow.keras.layers import Conv2D, MaxPooling2D, Dropout, Flatten, Dense

from sklearn.preprocessing import MinMaxScaler
from sklearn.metrics import root_mean_squared_error, r2_score
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
```

```{python}
df = pandas.read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/byui-cse/cse450-course/master/data/bikes.csv")
```

## Features n stuff
```{python}
#making a real date-time column
#df['datetime'] = pandas.to_datetime(df['dteday']) + pandas.to_timedelta(df['hr'], unit='h')


df['dteday'] = pandas.to_datetime(df['dteday'])

#  year
df['year'] = df['dteday'].dt.year

# month cycle
df['month'] = df['dteday'].dt.month
df['month_sin'] = numpy.sin(2 * numpy.pi * df['month'] / 12)
df['month_cos'] = numpy.cos(2 * numpy.pi * df['month'] / 12)

# day of year cycle
df['day_of_year'] = df['dteday'].dt.dayofyear
df['day_of_year_sin'] = numpy.sin(2 * numpy.pi * df['day_of_year'] / 365)
df['day_of_year_cos'] = numpy.cos(2 * numpy.pi * df['day_of_year'] / 365)

# day cycle
df['day_of_week'] = df['dteday'].dt.dayofweek.astype(int)
df['day_of_week_sin'] = numpy.sin(2 * numpy.pi * df['day_of_week'] / 7)
df['day_of_week_cos'] = numpy.cos(2 * numpy.pi * df['day_of_week'] / 7)

#  season cycle
df['season_sin'] = numpy.sin(2 * numpy.pi * df['season'] / 4)
df['season_cos'] = numpy.cos(2 * numpy.pi * df['season'] / 4)
```

## Yes?
```{python}
X = df.drop(columns=["casual", "registered", "dteday", "hr", "season"])
y = df[["casual", "registered"]]

X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(X, y, test_size = 0.2, random_state = 69)

scaler_x = MinMaxScaler()
scaler_y_casual = MinMaxScaler()
scaler_y_registered = MinMaxScaler()

scaler_x.fit(X_train)
scaler_y_casual.fit(y_train[["casual"]])
scaler_y_registered.fit(y_train[["registered"]])


X_train_s = scaler_x.transform(X_train)
X_test_s = scaler_x.transform(X_test)


y_train_s = numpy.hstack([
    scaler_y_casual.transform(y_train[["casual"]]),
    scaler_y_registered.transform(y_train[["registered"]])
])

y_test_s = numpy.hstack([
    scaler_y_casual.transform(y_test[["casual"]]),
    scaler_y_registered.transform(y_test[["registered"]])
])
```

```{python}
model = Sequential()
model.add(Dense(128, input_dim=X_train_s.shape[1], activation='relu'))
model.add(Dropout(.25))
model.add(Dense(256, activation='relu'))
model.add(Dropout(.5))
model.add(Dense(64, activation='leaky_relu'))
model.add(Dropout(.25))

model.add(Dense(2, activation='linear'))
```

```{python}
opt = keras.optimizers.Adam(learning_rate=0.0005)
model.compile(loss="mean_squared_error", optimizer=opt, metrics=['mse'])
```

```{python}
early_stop = keras.callbacks.EarlyStopping(monitor='val_mse', patience=30)

history = model.fit(
    X_train_s, 
    y_train_s, 
    epochs=2000, 
    validation_split=0.5, 
    batch_size=256,       
    callbacks=[early_stop], 
    shuffle=True          
)

hist = pandas.DataFrame(history.history)
```

```{python}
preds = model.predict(X_test_s)
```

```{python}
pred_casual_s = preds[:, 0].reshape(-1, 1)
pred_registered_s = preds[:, 1].reshape(-1, 1)


final_casual = scaler_y_casual.inverse_transform(pred_casual_s)
final_registered = scaler_y_registered.inverse_transform(pred_registered_s)


results = pandas.DataFrame({
    "predicted_casual": final_casual.flatten(),
    "predicted_registered": final_registered.flatten()
})
```

```{python}
import joblib

model.save("austin_model.keras")
joblib.dump(scaler_x, "scaler_x.pkl")
joblib.dump(scaler_y_casual, "scaler_y_casual.pkl")
joblib.dump(scaler_y_registered, "scaler_y_registered.pkl")
```

```{python}
ndf = pandas.read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/byui-cse/cse450-course/master/data/biking_holdout_test_mini.csv")

ndf['dteday'] = pandas.to_datetime(ndf['dteday'])

#  year
ndf['year'] = ndf['dteday'].dt.year

# month cycle
ndf['month'] = ndf['dteday'].dt.month
ndf['month_sin'] = numpy.sin(2 * numpy.pi * ndf['month'] / 12)
ndf['month_cos'] = numpy.cos(2 * numpy.pi * ndf['month'] / 12)

# day of year cycle
ndf['day_of_year'] = ndf['dteday'].dt.dayofyear
ndf['day_of_year_sin'] = numpy.sin(2 * numpy.pi * ndf['day_of_year'] / 365)
ndf['day_of_year_cos'] = numpy.cos(2 * numpy.pi * ndf['day_of_year'] / 365)

# day cycle
ndf['day_of_week'] = ndf['dteday'].dt.dayofweek.astype(int)
ndf['day_of_week_sin'] = numpy.sin(2 * numpy.pi * ndf['day_of_week'] / 7)
ndf['day_of_week_cos'] = numpy.cos(2 * numpy.pi * ndf['day_of_week'] / 7)

#  season cycle
ndf['season_sin'] = numpy.sin(2 * numpy.pi * ndf['season'] / 4)
ndf['season_cos'] = numpy.cos(2 * numpy.pi * ndf['season'] / 4)
```

```{python}
nX = ndf.drop(columns=["dteday", "hr", "season"])
```

```{python}
nX_s = scaler_x.transform(nX)
```

```{python}
import tensorflow
```

```{python}
model = tensorflow.keras.models.load_model('austin_model.keras')
```

```{python}
predictions = model.predict(nX_s)

pred_col1 = scaler_y_casual.inverse_transform(predictions[:, 0].reshape(-1, 1))
pred_col2 = scaler_y_registered.inverse_transform(predictions[:, 1].reshape(-1, 1))

results = pandas.DataFrame()

results['part1'] = pred_col1.flatten()
results['part2'] = pred_col2.flatten()
results['total'] = results['part1'] + results['part2']

real_prediction = pandas.DataFrame()
real_prediction['predictions'] = results['total']
```

```{python}
real_prediction.to_csv('austin-predictions.csv', index=False)
```
